title: Consumption per Grid Area (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] Hourly consumption per grid area.

Data is updated with a 9-15 day delay.
To comply with laws regarding the protection of private data, **methods for anonymizing data have been applied**. This dataset uses number and dominance as a criterion for confidentiality. The number criteria is set to 20 and the dominance criteria is set to 60 percent per hour for 3 hours straight. Some grid areas cannot be shown alone and will always be combined. These appears as a group in the dataset.  
In case of the criteria being exceeded, the dataset will combine data columns or aggregate data columns to a high level in the following order: 
1. Time being aggregated 
2. Grid areas being combined
